basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Project Assistant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Master's degree in Sociology / Environmental Studies / Development Studies or related fields, Master's degree in Environmental / Developmental Studies or related fields qualification can directly attend the interview on 27-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Sociology / Environmental Studies / Development Studies or related fields, Master's degree in Environmental / Developmental Studies or related fields
qualification.details: Project Assistant (Media): Master's degree in Sociology / Environmental Studies / Development Studies or related fields. Project Assistant (Documentation): Master's degree in Environmental / Developmental Studies or related fields.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant (Media): Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Project Assistant (Documentation): Rs. 30,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IISER Pune Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IISER Pune Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant (Media): Master's degree in Sociology / Environmental Studies / Development Studies or related fields. Project Assistant (Documentation): Master's degree in Environmental / Developmental Studies or related fields.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Assistant (Media): Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Project Assistant (Documentation): Rs. 30,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant posts at IISER Pune is scheduled for 27th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant (Media) post, a Master's degree in Sociology, Environmental Studies, Development Studies, or related fields is required. For the Project Assistant (Documentation) post, a Master's degree in Environmental or Developmental Studies or related fields is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Assistant posts is 30 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the available information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant roles?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant (Media) position is Rs. 45,000/- per month, and for the Project Assistant (Documentation) position, it is Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant posts at IISER Pune. One vacancy is for Project Assistant (Media) and the other is for Project Assistant (Documentation).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant posts at IISER Pune will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable). Recent passport-size photographs are also required.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Project Assistant positions at IISER Pune are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job type. This means the employment is for a fixed term.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify the exact venue address for the walk-in interview. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF for detailed venue information.
